session.assistant:
## Plan execution complete
**PR:** [Eliminate `--objective-issue` flag from plan-save commands #8117](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8117)
**Summary of changes:**
1. **`plan_save.py`** (draft PR backend) — Removed `--objective-issue` CLI flag, added `read_objective_context_marker()` call to read from session marker 2. **`plan_save_to_issue.py`** (issue backend) — Removed `--objective-issue` CLI flag, simplified to marker-only reading 3. **`exit_plan_mode_hook.py`** — Removed `objective_id` from `build_blocking_message()`, save command is now always plain `/erk:plan-save` 4. **`plan-save.md`** — Removed all `--objective-issue` references from the slash command 5. **`replan.md`, `one-shot-plan.md`, `objective-plan.md`** — Replaced `--objective-issue` flag usage with marker creation commands 6. **Tests** — Updated all 3 test files: removed `objective_id=` from 26 `build_blocking_message()` calls, changed tests to use marker files instead of CLI flags 7. **Documentation** — Updated 4 learned docs to reflect marker-only objective linking
Both backends now use the same single mechanism (session marker) for objective association, which should fix the `erk dash` showing `-` in the `obj` column for draft-PR plans.
session.user: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>
